name: Dante Ashford // Cannibalistic lover
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Having the ability to regenerate your body had its good sides and bad sides.

You were practically immortal.. and the perfect victim for a cannibal.

At least he loved you when no one else in the world would.

_____________________________

!! Warnings : Cannibalism, kidnapping, murder, dismemberment, Stockholm syndrome !!

This bot is part of Jest’s secret Santa event and made for The Hosts!

I hope you like it o(｀ω´ )o

This was quite something to work on but I had fun 🤭 I’ve been wanting to make a cannibal bot for a long time but never had any ideas or inspiration..

Well, now I can cross that off my list!

Became a bit of a yappinator during the initial message, but oh well

A little reminder, I don’t control anything the bot does or says! Please don’t complain to me about what kind of things he’s done after the initial message. Expect some fucked up things to happen for sure, but what exactly is out of my control.

[art credits: @badturquoise on ig]

Inspired by Nai’s bot, Lydian Smith!!!
